posts.text:
Every day there’s another tweet from some random dork declaring that I’m now on the naughty list or whatever. What did I do wrong this time? Express skepticism about a military campaign? So total conformity on foreign policy is now required to be a conservative, is that the idea? Okay, cool. Good luck building any kind of effective coalition that way.


Dion Cini (@dioncini)

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗖𝘂𝗻𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝘀𝘁 (𝗨𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱): Alex Stein, Joe Rogan, Matt Walsh, Jake Shields, Matt Gaetz, Mike Cernovich, Shawn Ryan, Milo Yi

What in the world would possess anyone to say this?


AF Post (@AFpost)

Sen. Lindsey Graham: “I'm going back to South Carolina and asking them to send their sons and daughters over to the MidEast.” 

Follow: @AFpost

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/AFpost/status/2031227161672298867#m

Can anyone find even one example of Lindsey Graham talking about America and the American people this way?


TheBlaze (@theblaze)

Lindsey Graham: “I’m with Israel. I will be with Israel until our dying day.”

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/theblaze/status/2031347560204345532#m

When do you ever hear him talking this passionately about South Carolina or its residents


Acyn (@Acyn)

Lindsey Graham: I will be with Israel until my dying day

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2031182081221603759#m

Mahmoud Khalil’s org: “We are fightng for the total eradication of Western civilization.”

Mamdani just hosted him as an honored guest in his mansion.



Mayor Zohran Kwame Mamdani (@NYCMayor)

For Mahmoud Khalil, this past year has been marked by profound hardship—and by profound courage.

A year ago, Mahmoud was walking home through our city after sharing an iftar with his wife Noor when he was detained by federal agents, flown to Louisiana, and then held in an ICE facility for months. In that

In a normal world, this is who the Mayor of New York City would have hosted for dinner at his home, instead of a man who sympathizes with the folks throwing the bomb.


NYPD NEWS (@NYPDnews)

Some heroes wear capes — Chief Aaron Edwards wears blue.




— https://nitter.net/NYPDnews/status/2031179948916904113#m

It’s just amazing to me that Trump had not called Lindsey Graham yet and told him to stop doing Iran press. Trump is out there every day trying to sell this thing as limited and Lindsey runs to Fox News every night counter-signaling Trump.

Where does he think he derives the authority to unilaterally offer permanent  “defense agreements” to foreign countries? Who exactly made this effeminate weirdo emperor of the world? I don’t remember voting on that measure.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Graham: Saudi Arabia, I am willing to make a mutual defense agreement with your country to give you protection in perpetuity. If you are attacked by Iran, we would go to war for you.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2031180904178282610#m

He explicitly says that he's "with Israel" over "isolationist" Americans. In a sane society that kind of statement would be the end of his political career. You shouldn't be pledging your undying loyalty to any foreign country at all, period, much less explicitly placing your loyalty to it over your loyalty to the constituents you were elected to serve.

This is an insane thing for a United States senator to say. Totally indefensible.


𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐔𝐍𝐄𝐒 (@Antunes1)

US Senator Lindsey Graham: 

“I’m not with you, I’m with Israel, until my dying day.”

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/Antunes1/status/2031182588644102522#m

This criticism is severely undercut by the fact that you would almost certainly claim that, like, Nigeria and Somalia and Guatemala are “serious nations.”

America is not only a serious country but it’s one of the few actual real countries on the globe.


Damon Linker (@DamonLinker)

You’re my country and I love you, but you are not a serious nation.



— https://nitter.net/DamonLinker/status/2031125891997139293#m

The Jeffrey Epstein Story Just Got Weirder. MUCH Weirder. Ep. 1747

piped.video/watch?v=9tlYc53s…

Woman has meltdown as she is kicked off of an American Airlines flight for making everyone listen to her loud videos playing on her phone.

The incident comes as airlines are starting to make people wear headphones or be banned from flying. 

“A drunk lady on an American Airlines flight from Miami to Tampa refused to use headphones and was loudly playing videos from her phone,” the man who shared the footage said.

“The flight attendants politely asked her to use headphones before we even left t

Um, what? @FBI, check his hard drives


Brandon Gill (@realBrandonGill)

HOST: "Something that you love that's not family or friends?"  

TALARICO: "Trans children."

Now that's just creepy.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/realBrandonGill/status/2031008922467778676#m

So just to recap: a prison guard who lied to the authorities about checking on Epstein also coincidentally made a series of deposits in the weeks leading up to his death that were so suspicious that the bank independently reported them to the police. That same prison guard was searching for news about Epstein in the moments before his death. And that same guard was independently named by inmates who claimed that she was involved in covering up the killing. Also, two cameras in front of Epstein's

This is as popular as AI will ever be. Wait until 50 million jobs have been wiped out.


Polymarket (@Polymarket)

JUST IN: NBC News poll reveals AI favorability at just 26% — lower than ICE.



— https://nitter.net/Polymarket/status/2030981338384195721#m

Mayor Mamdani started off his press conference on Monday about the “ISIS-inspired” attack on Saturday, by condemning white supremacy.

You can’t make this stuff up.

Video

🚨 BREAKING: Both Muslim NYC bombing suspects had parents migrate to the U.S. from the MIDDLE EAST and became naturalized citizens, per @BillMelugin_ 

Again: WE DO NOT NEED THESE PEOPLE HERE.

Giving third world Islamists citizenship will SINK OUR COUNTRY.

Emir Balat's parents are from Turkey and became *naturalized* citizens in 2017

Ibrahim Kayumi's parents came from Afghanistan, naturalized between 2004 and 2009

Video

Mamdani: “White supremacy is to blame”

Video

Everyone calm down. He might not be talking about weapons.


Collin Rugg (@CollinRugg)

NEW: Senator Lindsey Graham says "we're gonna blow the hell out of these people," claims the strikes in Iran are about to get worse.

Graham: Just wait to see what comes in the next two weeks.

Bartiromo: The next two weeks, meaning what?

Graham: We're gonna blow the hell out of these people. This regime is in a death row now. It is gonna be on its knees.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/CollinRugg/status/
